title: Acme Realty Corp Acquires 5-Property Industrial Portfolio in Chicago
summary: Acme Realty Corp announced today the acquisition of a 5-property industrial portfolio in the Chicago metropolitan area for approximately $320 million. The properties total 380,000 sq ft and are currently 94% leased.

title: Q3 2024 Financial Results: Revenue Up 6.5% Year-over-Year
summary: Acme Realty Corp reported Q3 2024 revenue of $148.2 million, a 6.5% increase compared to Q3 2023. Net income reached $56.3 million. Operating expenses were controlled at $91.9 million.

title: Acme Realty Expands Austin Office Campus with New 67,000 Sq Ft Build-to-Suit
summary: Acme Realty Corp broke ground on a 67,000 sq ft build-to-suit office facility in Austin, Texas. The project is pre-leased to a Fortune 500 technology tenant and is expected to deliver in Q2 2025.

title: Acme Realty Signs 10-Year Lease Renewal at 1 World Trade Center, New York
summary: Acme Realty Corp announced a 10-year lease renewal with a major financial services firm at 1 World Trade Center, New York, covering 95,000 sq ft. The renewal secures approximately $47.5 million in future contracted revenue.

title: Acme Realty Divests Three Non-Core Retail Assets in Los Angeles
summary: Acme Realty Corp completed the sale of three retail properties in the Los Angeles market for a combined $89 million, realizing a gain on sale of approximately $18 million. Proceeds will be redeployed into industrial and office assets.

title: Acme Realty Partners with GreenBuild Initiative for Portfolio Sustainability Upgrades
summary: Acme Realty Corp entered a strategic partnership with the GreenBuild Initiative to upgrade 12 properties across its portfolio to LEED Gold certification. The initiative targets a 30% reduction in energy consumption by 2026.

title: Q3 2023 Financial Results: Steady Growth Across Office and Industrial Segments
summary: Acme Realty Corp reported Q3 2023 revenue of $139.1 million with net income of $52.9 million. The industrial segment outperformed expectations with 8.2% revenue growth.

title: Acme Realty Acquires San Francisco Class-A Office Tower for $415 Million
summary: Acme Realty Corp completed the acquisition of a Class-A office tower at 555 Market Street, San Francisco for $415 million. The 52,000 sq ft property is 98% leased with a weighted average lease term of 7.3 years.
